---
title: "Kickoff - lecture 15"
author: "Peter Ganong and Maggie Shi"
date-format: February 23/24, 2026
format: 
    revealjs:
        slide-number: true
        show-slide-number: all
        self-contained: true
---

## Schedule this week
* Guest lecture 11AM-12PM Thursday in Sky Suite
    * Mon/Wed sections: RSVPs close at noon (link in Canvas)
    * Tue/Thu sections: attendance required
* Final exam
    * **Arrive 6:15PM** for attendance (taken before exam)
    * Like a quiz. Lockdown browser, bring id.
    * Exam starts at 6:30PM. No late start permitted.

## Notes for Mon/Tue
* Stay until end for attendance (no do-pair-share)
* Tue 2-3:20:  open office hours to talk about your project. Strongly encouraged to show what you have so far. Sign up [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1LdJo1yJfd1Kq01neww5iWvlgrG_r8CDpaBISagN0C-U/edit?gid=1292836342#gid=1292836342).
